datasheet.text: While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more FORTIFICATIONS from your army:
datasheet.name: Fortification

datasheet.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION , that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
datasheet.name: Tidewall Cover

datasheet.text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.
datasheet.name: Tidewall Defence Platform

items: That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol , subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked , except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

unit_composition.text: This model can be equipped with 1 Tidewall defence platform

entries.text: While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more FORTIFICATIONS from your army:
entries.name: Fortification

items: That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol , subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked , except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

entries.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION , that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
entries.name: Tidewall Cover

entries.text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.
entries.name: Tidewall Defence Platform

entries.text: This model can be equipped with 1 Tidewall defence platform

This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT , KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models. If this model is equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, it has a transport capacity of 22 T’au Infantry models instead.
